title: gastrochilus anomalus
intro: Gastrochilus anomalus, also known as the Anomalous Yellow Pogon, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gastrochilus anomalus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and dried extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
